headline: Exxon Mobil Warns On Oil Supply Tightness And Investor Valuation Risks
summary: Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) executives have warned that global oil inventories could soon hit record lows. The company flagged the risk of a sharp spike in crude prices if supply tightens further. This leadership commentary signals a potential shift in near term market conditions for oil and energy stocks. For investors watching Exxon Mobil at a share price of $145.26, this warning adds an extra layer to a stock that has returned 18.4% year to date and 46.5% over the past year. Over the shorter...
